title: Viking Therapeutics Presents Data from its 13-Week Phase 2 VENTURE-Oral Dosing Trial of VK2735 at European Congress on Obesity (ECO) 2026
text: Viking Therapeutics presented data from its Phase 2 VENTURE-Oral Dosing trial evaluating the oral tablet formulation of VK2735 at the European Congress on Obesity in Istanbul, Türkiye. Key Efficacy Results: Participants receiving once-daily oral VK2735 demonstrated statistically significant, dose-dependent weight loss from baseline of up to 12.2% (26.6 lbs) at 13 weeks across all dose cohorts. Up to 97% of VK2735-treated participants achieved ≥5% weight loss, and up to 80% achieved ≥10%, compared with 10% and 5%, respectively, for placebo. Safety Profile: VK2735 was well tolerated, with the vast majority of treatment-emergent adverse events reported as mild or moderate in severity, and these events typically occurred early in treatment and resolved with continued dosing. Development Pipeline: Viking announced completion of enrollment in the Phase 3 VANQUISH-2 trial and plans to launch Phase 3 development of the oral VK2735 formulation in Q4 2026.
